title: Envelope
description: Outer wrapper for every message on the browser ↔ daemon WebSocket. The 'kind' field discriminates between request, response, and event; the 'type' field names the primitive (e.g. 'fs.read', 'pty.output'). 'id' correlates request/response pairs and is omitted on events.

kind.description: Message direction / shape. 'request' expects a matching 'response'; 'event' is server-pushed; 'error' is a failed response.

type.description: Primitive name in dotted form, e.g. 'fs.read', 'pty.output', 'workspace.info'.

id.description: Correlation id for request/response. UUIDv4 recommended. Omitted on events.

payload.description: Type-specific body. Validated against the schema for 'type'.

error.description: Set when kind == 'error'. Code is a stable string for client switching; message is human-readable.
